name: bugfix-workflow
description: 标准化Bug修复工作流程：创建分支 -> 修复问题 -> 提交GitHub -> 部署Docker -> 等待验证 -> 合并主分支
author: Claude

steps.name: create-fix-branch
steps.description: 从main创建修复分支，命名格式：fix/问题描述
steps.command: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git checkout -b ${branch_name}

steps.name: fix-and-commit
steps.command:
git add . && git commit -m "fix: ${commit_message}

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

steps.name: deploy-docker
steps.command: docker-compose down && docker-compose build backend && docker-compose up -d

steps.name: verify-service
steps.description: 等待服务启动并验证健康状态

steps.name: merge-to-main
steps.description: 验证通过后合并到main分支
steps.command: git checkout main && git merge ${branch_name} && git push origin main
